scope: ATS-safe single-column cover letter visual reference matching the approved refined resume
implementation_notes: Use this cover letter as the matching document-family reference for the refined ATS-safe resume.
Keep the cover letter single-column and avoid decorative sidebars for portal uploads.
Avoid wide letter spacing on labels or footer text because PDF extraction can split words into characters.
Do not treat fixture copy, contact details, or the sample employer as approved candidate content.
open_items: Implementation still needs real resume and cover-letter content fixtures for short, typical, and long applications.
Both A4 and Letter paper behavior should be verified in the implemented builder.
The production generator should include a text-extraction gate before approving generated PDFs.
